data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for walk-in support, specifically queue management. While there is evidence of a customer entering a waitlist/queue flow, it does not confirm that the system effectively manages walk-ins or provides the necessary functionalities for queue management as required. The evidence does not detail how walk-ins are handled beyond their entry into a queue, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: Insufficient evidence demonstrating effective management of walk-ins beyond queue entry.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for walk-in queue management functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system provides functionalities for managing walk-ins effectively.
